title: Fix reply_buf drop when event set in forward_mesh_to_upstream
description: Restructure to always queue reply if reply_len > 0 independently of RplEvent. Prevent early return or scope drop of buffer in event branches. Integrate handle_frame_rpl in lichend.rs forward. No comments in code. Discovered-from fhed. Run 3 codereview passes.
close_reason: Fixed reply_buf drop, added SRH for downward in forward_mesh_to_upstream with SourceRoutingHeader and lookup per spec, fixed is_local_mesh to use RPL routes with proper prefix checks for fe80::/10 fd00::/8. 3 codereview passes clean with no open findings after clippy/tests fixes in gateway/rpl/node. All quality gates passed.
